seedanceSegments.title: Butter sizzle and pearl the rice
seedanceSegments.description: Foaming butter, soft shallots, dry rice toast, white wine flash steam.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionCloseup only as the cooktop framing. Use @SaucepanLarge only as the pan silhouette. Use @Spatula only as the tool shape. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve correct Licorn hands. Generate exactly 9 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Vertical 1080:1920 TikTok ASMR food, macro-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only sizzle, pour, and scrape ASMR synced to cuts. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.6s butter foams in hot pan close-up; 0.6-1.1s shallots turn glossy and translucent; 1.1-1.8s dry risotto rice rains in and skates on fat; 1.8-2.6s spatula turns rice until grains look pearly at the edges; 2.6-3.2s white wine hits rice with hiss and steam puff; 3.2-5.0s liquid tightens and gloss fades on grains. Global negatives: no visible flames on induction, no Thermomix UI, no ingredient lineup table shot, no on-screen text, no second pan, no extra hands.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening segment; scene-02 pays off scene-01 per storyboard.
seedanceSegments.risk: Induction must never read as gas flame. Keep one clear stirring gesture.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: butter sizzle; soft scrape; wine hiss; steam puff

seedanceSegments.title: Broth risotto, parmesan and peas
seedanceSegments.description: Broth pour, satin stir, salt crack, fold parmesan parsley peas.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionCloseup for the cooktop macro. Use @SaucepanLarge as pan identity. Use @Spatula for folding and turning. Use @Spoon only as an optional supple stir tool shape if needed in one shot. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for Licorn hands. Generate exactly 8 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots, no text, vertical 1080:1920. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; broth pour, bubble, and velvety stir ASMR only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s hot broth ribbons pour onto pearly rice and steam rises; 0.9-2.1s spatula folds until liquid silkens and clings; 2.1-2.8s quick steam veil; 2.8-3.5s salt and pepper drop onto creamy surface; 3.5-4.3s parmesan snow falls; 4.3-4.9s parsley sprinkle; 4.9-6.0s bright peas tumble in and fold to a green-flecked cream base. Global negatives: no soup-flood plate, no mush explosion, no tutorial typography, no blender, no simultaneous split-screen.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Continues directly after wine absorption segment.
seedanceSegments.risk: Risotto must stay creamy, not watery soup or dry pilaf.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: broth pour; viscous stir; salt crack; dry cheese sprinkle

seedanceSegments.title: Cool, stuff mozzarella, seal spheres
seedanceSegments.description: Wide chill transfer, cooled mix reference state, palm press, cheese cube, sealed ball row.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead island actions. Use @CooledRisottoPeasParmesanMix only as the target cooled risotto: distinct grains, bright peas, parsley flecks, matte-sticky hold, not soupy. Use @StuffedSealedAranciniBall only as the sealed 6cm sphere before breading: smooth rice skin, no cheese visible outside. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for Licorn hands. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots, vertical 1080:1920, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; soft press and rub ASMR only. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s wide transfer of risotto to shallow dish on island; 1.0-2.0s cooled mix reference close-up shows firm sticky grains; 2.0-3.0s palm compresses a portion; 3.0-3.7s finger dents center, mozzarella cube visible; 3.7-4.7s rice closes over cheese and rolls to a sealed ball; 4.7-6.0s row of identical raw spheres on board. Global negatives: no cheese leaking pre-fry, no giant meatball smoothness, no sesame seeds, no extra props, no recipe text overlays.

seedanceSegments.title: Double flour-egg-breadcrumb pass
seedanceSegments.description: Flour dust, egg cling, crumb shower, repeat, pale breaded lineup.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for breading station overhead. Use @DoubleBreadedAranciniRaw only as the pale, heavily crumbed sphere after second pass: rough micro-texture, no golden fry yet. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for Licorn hands. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no extra shots, vertical 1080:1920, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; dry dusting, wet drag, crumb shower ASMR. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s sphere rolls in flour until matte white; 0.8-1.7s egg wash coats with yellow drips; 1.7-2.6s first breadcrumb avalanche clings; 2.6-3.4s second egg drag; 3.4-4.3s second crumb pass thickens crust; 4.3-5.0s lineup of pale breaded balls beside pot edge hint. Global negatives: no pre-fried gold, no panko confusion if fine crumb required, no hands outside frame, no cutting yet.

seedanceSegments.title: Deep fry to deep gold
seedanceSegments.description: Submerge pale breaded ball, bubbling crust color shift, drain on paper.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionCloseup for fry pot framing. Use @SaucepanLarge as the fry vessel silhouette. Use @DoubleBreadedAranciniRaw only as the pale crumb ball entering oil. Use @FriedGoldenAranciniHero only as the finished fried sphere: deep golden micro-crumbs, dry oil sheen, no burnt black. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight for one medium shot of cook reaction if included in final shot. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots, vertical 1080:1920, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; aggressive fry bubble ASMR. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.4s pale ball hovers; 0.4-1.4s submerge triggers dense bubble skirt; 1.4-2.3s hard cut if color morph risks drift; 2.3-4.3s fried golden reference dominates, crust blistering; 4.3-5.2s spider skims sphere, oil drips; 5.2-6.0s paper towel blot with faint steam. Global negatives: no fire jet, no undercooked pale exit, no cheese leak mid-fry, no microwave, no captions.

seedanceSegments.title: Crack crust and mozzarella pull
seedanceSegments.description: Knife pressure crack, hands split, steam wisp, stretch cheese core.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for the break table. Use @FriedGoldenAranciniHero only as the intact fried shell reference before the break. Use @AranciniCrossSectionCheesePull only as the broken interior: rice plus peas, molten mozzarella heart with silk pull, steam wisp. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for Licorn hands. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no extra shots, vertical 1080:1920, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; crust crack, soft tear, stretch ASMR. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s knife tip presses crust until micro-fractures; 0.9-1.7s hard cut; 1.7-3.0s hands break sphere open along reference cross-section, steam rises; 3.0-4.2s mozzarella filament lengthens still anchored; 4.2-5.0s stray crumb falls. Global negatives: no cold cheese block, no empty cavity, no narrated insert, no spoon scoop.

seedanceSegments.title: Bowl hero and Licorn satisfaction
seedanceSegments.description: Serving bowl stack, spoon scrape crust, optional salad, character smile.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity and the Licorn island plating zone. Use @FriedGoldenAranciniHero for the pile of finished spheres in the large bowl matching cookbook gold. Use @CharacterSheet, @PoseThreeQuarterLeft, and @CharacterExpressions if needed for subtle satisfaction without dialog. Use @Spoon only as serving spoon silhouette scraping crust. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no extra shots, vertical 1080:1920, no text. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; metal-on-crust scrape, soft cloth, ambient kitchen. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s wide bowl filled with stacked golden arancini like the reference; 1.2-2.4s serving spoon drags across crust micro-peaks; 2.4-3.4s optional small salad bowl of mixed young leaves enters frame edge; 3.4-5.0s Licorn character visible beside the spread, pleased micro-expression, no talking. Global negatives: no final slicing hook as only beat, no camera text, no music sting, no duplicate broken hero replacing whole pile.
